title: Mixed Preposition Triples
description: Practice three prepositional phrases selected from Sets 1–5.

questions.sentence: We met ___ noon ___ the station ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: We met at noon near the station after class.
questions.japanese: 授業後、駅の近くで正午に会った。

questions.sentence: She arrived ___ Monday ___ her sister ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: She arrived on Monday with her sister before lunch.
questions.japanese: 彼女は月曜日、昼食前に姉妹と一緒に到着した。

questions.sentence: We studied ___ two hours ___ the library ___ the window.
questions.completedSentence: We studied for two hours in the library beside the window.
questions.japanese: 図書館の窓のそばで2時間勉強した。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the field ___ the woods ___ its owner.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran across the field into the woods with its owner.
questions.japanese: 犬は飼い主と野原を横切って森へ走り込んだ。

questions.sentence: The package came ___ Osaka ___ Tokyo ___ Friday.
questions.completedSentence: The package came from Osaka via Tokyo on Friday.
questions.japanese: 荷物は金曜日に東京経由で大阪から届いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the rain, we walked ___ the station ___ the hall.
questions.completedSentence: despite the rain, we walked toward the station into the hall.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、駅の方へ歩いてホールに入った。

questions.sentence: He spoke ___ the project ___ a guide ___ the meeting.
questions.completedSentence: He spoke about the project as a guide before the meeting.
questions.japanese: 彼は会議前にガイドとしてプロジェクトについて話した。

questions.sentence: We waited ___ the café ___ an hour ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: We waited outside the café for an hour at noon.
questions.japanese: カフェの外で正午に1時間待った。

questions.sentence: The film is ___ seeing ___ classmates ___ the weekend.
questions.completedSentence: The film is worth seeing with classmates on the weekend.
questions.japanese: その映画は週末にクラスメートと見る価値がある。

questions.sentence: She walked ___ the park ___ the bridge ___ dinner.
questions.completedSentence: She walked across the park toward the bridge after dinner.
questions.japanese: 彼女は夕食後、公園を横切って橋の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: The train came ___ Kyoto ___ a tunnel ___ Osaka.
questions.completedSentence: The train came from Kyoto through a tunnel toward Osaka.
questions.japanese: 列車は京都からトンネルを通って大阪の方へ進んだ。

questions.sentence: We studied ___ the classroom ___ the door ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: We studied in the classroom near the door before lunch.
questions.japanese: 昼食前、教室のドアの近くで勉強した。

questions.sentence: He worked ___ a volunteer ___ the festival ___ two days.
questions.completedSentence: He worked as a volunteer at the festival for two days.
questions.japanese: 彼は祭りで2日間ボランティアとして働いた。

questions.sentence: The cyclist rode ___ the gate ___ the road ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The cyclist rode through the gate across the road toward the station.
questions.japanese: 自転車の人は門を通り、道路を横切って駅の方へ進んだ。

questions.sentence: ___ the cold, they waited ___ the building ___ the entrance.
questions.completedSentence: despite the cold, they waited outside the building near the entrance.
questions.japanese: 寒さにもかかわらず、彼らは建物の外で入口の近くに待っていた。

questions.sentence: Submit the report ___ Friday ___ the word limit ___ help.
questions.completedSentence: Submit the report by Friday within the word limit without help.
questions.japanese: 助けなしで字数制限内にレポートを金曜日までに提出すること。

questions.sentence: We stayed quiet ___ the exam ___ noon ___ the building.
questions.completedSentence: We stayed quiet during the exam until noon throughout the building.
questions.japanese: 建物全体で、正午まで試験中は静かにしていた。

questions.sentence: The clock hangs ___ the door ___ the counter ___ two signs.
questions.completedSentence: The clock hangs above the door behind the counter between two signs.
questions.japanese: 時計はカウンターの後ろで二つの標識の間にあるドアの上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: The bag is ___ the desk ___ the shelf ___ the window.
questions.completedSentence: The bag is under the desk underneath the shelf below the window.
questions.japanese: かばんは机の下、棚の真下で窓より下にある。

questions.sentence: The road runs ___ the coast ___ the bridge ___ the village.
questions.completedSentence: The road runs along the coast over the bridge to the village.
questions.japanese: 道路は海岸に沿い、橋を越えて村まで続いている。

questions.sentence: The team voted ___ the plan ___ the meeting ___ hesitation.
questions.completedSentence: The team voted against the plan during the meeting without hesitation.
questions.japanese: チームは会議中、ためらわずにその計画に反対票を投じた。

questions.sentence: The cat jumped ___ the sofa ___ the floor ___ the table.
questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped off the sofa onto the floor under the table.
questions.japanese: 猫はソファーから床へ飛び降り、テーブルの下に入った。

questions.sentence: She has lived ___ the station ___ 2023 ___ the city limits.
questions.completedSentence: She has lived behind the station since 2023 within the city limits.
questions.japanese: 彼女は2023年から市内の駅の後ろに住んでいる。

questions.sentence: The bridge stretches ___ the river ___ the towns ___ the castle.
questions.completedSentence: The bridge stretches over the river between the towns below the castle.
questions.japanese: 橋は城の下で二つの町の間を流れる川の上に架かっている。

questions.sentence: Lights shone ___ the event ___ midnight ___ the stage.
questions.completedSentence: Lights shone throughout the event until midnight above the stage.
questions.japanese: 行事中ずっと、舞台の上の照明は深夜まで輝いていた。

questions.sentence: The train traveled ___ Kyoto ___ the river ___ the highway.
questions.completedSentence: The train traveled to Kyoto along the river underneath the highway.
questions.japanese: 列車は川に沿い、高速道路の下を通って京都へ向かった。

questions.sentence: The sign fell ___ the wall ___ the desk ___ the storm.
questions.completedSentence: The sign fell off the wall onto the desk during the storm.
questions.japanese: 嵐の間に標識が壁から机の上へ落ちた。

questions.sentence: He worked ___ a break ___ noon ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: He worked without a break since noon throughout the afternoon.
questions.japanese: 彼は正午から午後ずっと休憩なしで働いた。

questions.sentence: The path goes ___ the bridge ___ the station ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: The path goes under the bridge behind the station to the park.
questions.japanese: 小道は駅の後ろにある橋の下を通って公園へ続いている。

questions.sentence: The ball rolled ___ the chairs ___ the table ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: The ball rolled between the chairs below the table against the wall.
questions.japanese: ボールは椅子の間を転がり、テーブルの下で壁に当たった。

questions.sentence: ___ English, she studies French ___ an app ___ her sister.
questions.completedSentence: besides English, she studies French via an app with her sister.
questions.japanese: 英語のほかに、彼女は姉妹とアプリでフランス語も勉強している。

questions.sentence: The village lies ___ the river ___ the valley ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: The village lies beyond the river down the valley outside the city.
questions.japanese: その村は町の外で谷を下った川の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: The cat ran ___ the house ___ the stairs ___ the bedroom.
questions.completedSentence: The cat ran inside the house up the stairs into the bedroom.
questions.japanese: 猫は家の中へ走り、階段を上って寝室へ入った。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Ken walked ___ the station ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Ken walked toward the station through the park.
questions.japanese: ケン以外は全員、公園を通って駅の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: The child danced ___ a star ___ the guests ___ the hall.
questions.completedSentence: The child danced like a star among the guests in the hall.
questions.japanese: その子どもはホールで客の中に入り、スターのように踊った。

questions.sentence: We drove ___ the school ___ the lake ___ the hills.
questions.completedSentence: We drove past the school around the lake toward the hills.
questions.japanese: 学校の前を通り過ぎ、湖を回って丘の方へ車で進んだ。

questions.sentence: The title ___ the book came ___ a poem ___ French.
questions.completedSentence: The title of the book came from a poem in French.
questions.japanese: その本の題名はフランス語の詩から取られた。

questions.sentence: The museum is ___ visiting ___ weekends ___ friends.
questions.completedSentence: The museum is worth visiting on weekends with friends.
questions.japanese: その博物館は週末に友人と訪れる価値がある。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the yard ___ the gate ___ the street.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran around the yard past the gate into the street.
questions.japanese: 犬は庭を走り回り、門を通り過ぎて通りへ出た。

questions.sentence: ___ the café, a bookstore stands ___ the station ___ the gate.
questions.completedSentence: besides the café, a bookstore stands near the station outside the gate.
questions.japanese: カフェのほかに、本屋が門の外で駅の近くにある。

questions.sentence: The path continues ___ the bridge ___ the hill ___ the forest.
questions.completedSentence: The path continues beyond the bridge up the hill through the forest.
questions.japanese: 小道は橋の先から丘を上り、森を通って続いている。

questions.sentence: The students sat ___ the trees ___ the lake ___ silence.
questions.completedSentence: The students sat among the trees near the lake in silence.
questions.japanese: 学生たちは静かに湖の近くの木々の間に座った。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Aya moved ___ the hall ___ the courtyard.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Aya moved inside the hall from the courtyard.
questions.japanese: アヤ以外は全員、中庭からホールの中へ移動した。

questions.sentence: The road goes ___ the slope ___ the farm ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: The road goes down the slope past the farm toward the river.
questions.japanese: 道路は斜面を下り、農場の前を通り過ぎて川の方へ続いている。

questions.sentence: The cloud looked ___ a ship ___ the tower ___ the horizon.
questions.completedSentence: The cloud looked like a ship beyond the tower on the horizon.
questions.japanese: その雲は地平線上で塔の向こうにある船のように見えた。

questions.sentence: We met ___ the café ___ the station ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: We met at the café near the station after class.
questions.japanese: 授業後、駅の近くのカフェで会った。

questions.sentence: She studied ___ the library ___ dinner ___ her phone.
questions.completedSentence: She studied in the library before dinner without her phone.
questions.japanese: 彼女は夕食前、携帯電話なしで図書館で勉強した。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the gate ___ the hill ___ the trees.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran past the gate up the hill beyond the trees.
questions.japanese: 犬は門の前を通り過ぎ、丘を上って木々の向こうへ走った。

questions.sentence: Submit the file ___ Friday ___ noon ___ errors.
questions.completedSentence: Submit the file by Friday before noon without errors.
questions.japanese: 間違いなく金曜日の正午前までにファイルを提出すること。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the river ___ the bridge ___ the village.
questions.completedSentence: We walked along the river under the bridge beyond the village.
questions.japanese: 川に沿って橋の下を通り、村の向こうまで歩いた。

questions.sentence: I received a message ___ Aya ___ the meeting ___ Monday.
questions.completedSentence: I received a message from Aya about the meeting on Monday.
questions.japanese: 月曜日の会議についてアヤからメッセージを受け取った。

questions.sentence: ___ the rain, they waited ___ the station ___ the exit.
questions.completedSentence: despite the rain, they waited inside the station near the exit.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、彼らは駅の中で出口の近くに待っていた。

questions.sentence: The plane flew ___ the city ___ the clouds ___ sunset.
questions.completedSentence: The plane flew over the city between the clouds after sunset.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は日没後、雲の間を町の上空へ飛んだ。

questions.sentence: He worked ___ Ken ___ the office ___ Friday.
questions.completedSentence: He worked with Ken in the office on Friday.
questions.japanese: 彼は金曜日に事務室でケンと働いた。

questions.sentence: The child hid ___ the table ___ two chairs ___ speaking.
questions.completedSentence: The child hid under the table between two chairs without speaking.
questions.japanese: その子どもは何も言わずに二脚の椅子の間にあるテーブルの下に隠れた。

questions.sentence: The bus went ___ the school ___ the coast ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: The bus went past the school along the coast before lunch.
questions.japanese: バスは昼食前に学校の前を通り過ぎ、海岸に沿って進んだ。

questions.sentence: We arrived ___ noon ___ Kyoto ___ a short delay.
questions.completedSentence: We arrived at noon from Kyoto after a short delay.
questions.japanese: 少し遅れた後、京都から正午に到着した。

questions.sentence: She read ___ the museum ___ the café ___ Sunday.
questions.completedSentence: She read about the museum inside the café on Sunday.
questions.japanese: 彼女は日曜日にカフェの中で博物館について読んだ。

questions.sentence: ___ the wind, the hikers climbed ___ the trail ___ the bridge.
questions.completedSentence: despite the wind, the hikers climbed up the trail beyond the bridge.
questions.japanese: 風にもかかわらず、登山者たちは小道を上り、橋の向こうまで進んだ。

questions.sentence: Finish the form ___ Monday ___ your name ___ English.
questions.completedSentence: Finish the form by Monday with your name in English.
questions.japanese: 月曜日までに英語で名前を記入して用紙を完成させること。
